scope: ReplyRight desktop safety and assurance starter evidence for future Aerospace & Defense workflows.
assumptions: ReplyRight is currently a hotel operations desktop application and is not deployed in an airborne safety-critical function.
This artifact starts a compliance-oriented evidence pattern only; it is not a certification claim and is not a substitute for a certification plan, DER review, PSAC, SAS, SCI, or SOI audit.
External AI output must remain advisory and human-reviewed for any future regulated workflow.

objectives.title: Compliance scope is explicit
objectives.requirement: The repository must state that DO-178C work is a starter evidence suite and not a certification claim.

objectives.title: Traceability entries are complete
objectives.requirement: Every compliance objective must map to requirements, verification method, artifacts, and tests.

objectives.title: Outlook integration remains read-only
objectives.requirement: The desktop Outlook integration must not send, delete, move, archive, mark read, categorize, flag, reply, or forward messages.

objectives.title: Training path avoids paid external AI
objectives.requirement: In-app training must not call Claude or other paid AI APIs while exporting or compacting training examples.

objectives.title: Native shell avoids browser engines
objectives.requirement: The active desktop shell must remain PySide6 native without QWebEngine, Electron, Tauri, or pywebview.
